latentCause: A subsurface water main leak eroding the road base and causing localized soil saturation.
signalChain: R041: Loss of main pressure indicating a breach in the local distribution line.
R058: Soil washout underneath the pavement resulting in a sinkhole depression.
R072: Sediment and rust infiltration into the water supply caused by pressure fluctuations and pipe wall degradation at the breach site.
R086: Constant seepage of treated water to the surface despite dry weather, confirming a persistent underground leak.
whyMissed: The reports are categorized under distinct civic departments—water, roads, and drainage—preventing a unified view; individually, they appear as minor maintenance issues, and their geographical proximity is ignored by volume-ranked algorithms that prioritize high-frequency incident types over cross-category spatial clustering.
